title: felicia scabrida
intro: Felicia scabrida, also known as the rough felicia, is a small, flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Felicia scabrida include reducing fever and relieving symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
